_comment: Mirror of silmari-af-deep-research/ui/defaults.json one-click defaults, so reel-af does not import across repos (Plan 4, ISC-22). EXCLUSIONS: 'query' is caller-supplied, not a default; 'model' is omitted (blank => DR server default); 'api_key' is NEVER mirrored (secret-shaped, must not live in a defaults file). Keys prefixed with '_' are documentation only and are dropped by _load_research_defaults(). num_parallel_streams default is 2 (matches defaults.json).
